description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Slot wrists; Price 13,900 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This simple pair of leather shooting bracers are designed to protect the wearerâs wrist from being snapped by bowstrings. They appear similar to a set of bracers of archery, but a wearer notices the difference as soon as she dons them. The wearer of these bracers gains damage reduction 5/magic against ranged weapons, as well as a +1 deflection bonus against ranged attacks. In addition, once per day, as a swift action, the wearer can grant herself a +20 insight bonus on her next ranged attack roll before the end of her next turn. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells protection from arrows, true strike; Cost 6,950 gp.
